languages.text: "За подобные высказывания о комиссарах в любом настоящем полку тебя бы расстреляли".
"In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of Commissars that way."
languages.original_text: "За подобные высказывания о комиссарах в любом настоящем полку тебя бы расстреляли".

traits.locale_text: "In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of Commissars that way."
"In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of Commissars that way."
"In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of commissars that way."
"In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of commissars that way."
"In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of Commissars that way."

languages.text: "In jedem normalen Regiment würdet Ihr exekutiert, würdet Ihr so mit Kommissaren reden."
languages.original_text: "In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of commissars that way."

traits.locale_text: "In jedem normalen Regiment würdet Ihr exekutiert, würdet Ihr so mit Kommissaren reden."

languages.text: « Au sein d'une armée digne de ce nom, vous seriez exécuté pour oser parler ainsi des commissaires. »
languages.original_text: "In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of commissars that way."

traits.locale_text: « Au sein d'une armée digne de ce nom, vous seriez exécuté pour oser parler ainsi des commissaires. »

languages.text: «En cualquier otro regimiento le mandarían ejecutar por hablar así de los comisarios».
languages.original_text: "In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of commissars that way."

traits.locale_text: «En cualquier otro regimiento le mandarían ejecutar por hablar así de los comisarios».

languages.text: "Düzgün bir alayda olsak komiserler hakkında böyle şeyler söylediğin için idam edilirdin."
languages.original_text: "In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of commissars that way."

traits.locale_text: "Düzgün bir alayda olsak komiserler hakkında böyle şeyler söylediğin için idam edilirdin."

languages.text: “在正规军团里，你这样谈论政委早就被处决了。”
languages.original_text: "In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of commissars that way."

traits.locale_text: “在正规军团里，你这样谈论政委早就被处决了。”

languages.text: 「どんな正統な連隊でも、コミッサールたちをそんな風に話すなら、処刑されるだろう」
languages.original_text: "In any proper regiment, you'd be executed for speaking of commissars that way."

traits.locale_text: 「どんな正統な連隊でも、コミッサールたちをそんな風に話すなら、処刑されるだろう」
